data.name: Xeno Girlfriend 3
data.detailed_description:
After Xipra has her fun with you, you wake up the next day, and as usual, Xipra is eager to punish you for passing out without permission. Xipra, your big-breasted alien girlfriend, expresses her love for you by dominating you, and you're completely okay with it because you're a huge masochist that loves being tormented by your super-sexy alien girlfriend.

Experience a day with Xipra, your sadistic, dominant, femdom-obsessed, big-breasted alien girlfriend who loves, loves, loves, loves, loves you more than life itself.

  • ~1K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 16 Unique character images

  • 18 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
